'''''Off Chance''''' was an old [[Blockade runner (disambiguation)|blockade runner]] that had been won by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] in a [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game.

After the [[Raid on GemDiver Station|raid]] on [[GemDiver Station]], Calrissian lent the ship to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] so that they could travel anonymously as they searched for the kidnappers of the [[Solo twins (disambiguation)|Solo twins]], [[Lowbacca]], and [[M-TD|Em Teedee]]. They flew ''Off Chance'' to [[Borgo Prime/Legends|Borgo Prime]] under the guise of [[Randoni]] traders, hoping to find Lando's [[Corusca gem/Legends|Corusca gem]] broker, since GemDiver Station was the only source of industrial-grade Corusca gems, the kind used to chew through the station's hull.

After meeting with the broker, they discovered that a [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] had bought the Corusca gems. Luke and Tenel Ka then used ''Off Chance'' to take them to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. She was left in the custody of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]] after Luke and Tenel Ka left Dathomir in ''[[Shadow Chaser]]'', as they posed as new [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] candidates in an attempt to infiltrate the [[Shadow Academy]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Shadow Academy]]''
